raw.subject: Something I noticed about your Lancaster page, 601 Hair - Nails & Spa
raw.body:
Hi,

I love seeing the way you celebrate your clients this time of year, especially with your Mother's Day promotion - who wouldn't want a complimentary slice of cheesecake and a refreshing drink with their nail service?

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be leaving some potential bookings and calls on the table. As a local business, having an online presence can really help you reach and engage with customers in your area.

I sketched out a simple homepage idea from your Facebook photos and posts. It includes a services menu, a work gallery showcasing your talented team, a prominent booking call-to-action, and easy-to-find hours and location. Here's a preview:

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/601-hair-nails-spa-lancaster

If you're interested in learning more about bringing this online, I'd be happy to discuss a straightforward project with a flat fee for local businesses. Just reply or let's schedule a quick call to chat details.
